title: Supply Chain Manager - Ceva Logistics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Ceva Logistics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Ceva Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ceva Logistics India:
Ceva Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ceva Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
